goal: Bootstrap orchestration engine: agent registry, intent classifier, circuit breakers, error recovery

decisions.decision: Use keyword-weighted matching for intent classification instead of LLM-based NLU
decisions.rationale: Deterministic, zero-latency, zero-cost, fully testable. LLM fallback can be layered later without changing the interface.

decisions.decision: Circuit breaker uses CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN state machine with configurable thresholds
decisions.rationale: Industry standard pattern. HALF_OPEN enables automatic recovery without manual intervention. Default: 3 failures to open, 60s reset timeout.

decisions.decision: Error recovery maps error types to strategies rather than one-size-fits-all retry
decisions.rationale: RATE_LIMITED needs backoff, TOOL_FAILURE needs fallback, BUDGET_EXCEEDED needs degradation, MODEL_REFUSAL needs abort. Different errors need different strategies.

summary: Bootstrapped orchestration engine core. Completed 4 beads: ORCH-001 (agent registry with 9 agents, circuit breakers), ORCH-002 (intent classifier with 10 patterns), ORCH-003 (circuit breaker enhancements), ORCH-008 (error recovery engine). All verified and committed. Unblocked ORCH-004/005/006/007 and CROSS-001/002 for downstream agents.
